_comment: LAT-2771 — EN ui_strings-overlay voor de T9-gate. Gemeten op prod-HTML (build 870, 22-07): dit zijn de keys waarvan de NL-default nog zichtbaar was op /en/accommodaties/, /en/accommodaties/<streek>/, /en/artikelen/, /en/auteurs/ en /en/auteurs/<slug>/, aangevuld met de rest van dezelfde namespaces en de nieuwe affiliate-disclosure-keys uit deze ticket. Het seed-script is idempotent: keys met een bestaand EN-record worden overgeslagen.
artikel.toc.heading: Contents
ui.relatedArticles.label: Articles
affiliate.block.accommodation.title: Where to stay
acc.intro: A hand-picked selection of places to stay per destination. Not a random hotel listing, but addresses we would book ourselves. Prices are indicative "from" rates and vary by season.
acc.navLabel: Which destination are you looking for a place to stay in?
acc.groepNote: All within a ~40 min drive of each other
acc.disclosure: Affiliate links · we may earn a commission if you book through these links; you pay nothing extra. We only show accommodations and photos permitted under our affiliate and licensing programmes.
artikelen.index.meta.title: Articles, wine stories and travel tips
artikelen.index.meta.description: Read our wine stories, regional guides and tasting notes, written by wine lovers with a passion for terroir.
artikelen.index.hero.label: Articles
artikelen.index.hero.desc: Honest stories, tasting notes and in-depth regional guides, written by wine lovers.
artikelen.index.filterEmpty.title: No articles match these filters
artikelen.index.filterEmpty.desc: Adjust your selection or clear the filters to see everything.
artikelen.index.empty.title: Articles are on their way
artikelen.index.empty.desc: We are working on wine stories and regional guides based on our own visits to the vineyards.
accommodaties.index.meta.title: Accommodation in wine regions, hand-picked stays | VinoMartino
accommodaties.index.meta.description: A personal selection of places to stay per wine region, with real photos, location and price indication. Not a random hotel listing, but addresses we would book ourselves.
accommodaties.index.hero.label: Accommodation
accommodaties.index.hero.h1: Where to stay in the wine region
accommodaties.index.hero.desc: A hand-picked selection of stays for every region, not a random hotel listing. Pick a region and find addresses we would book ourselves.
accommodaties.index.empty.title: The selections are on their way
accommodaties.index.empty.descPre: We are curating a handful of stays with real photos for each region. In the meantime, start with the
accommodaties.roundup.heroDesc: Hand-picked addresses per destination, not a random hotel listing. Places we would book ourselves, with real photos and an honest price indication.
accommodaties.roundup.meta.descPre: A personal selection of places to stay in
accommodaties.roundup.meta.descPost: , with real photos, location and price indication. Not a random hotel listing, but addresses we would book ourselves.
auteurs.index.meta.title: Authors — VinoMartino
auteurs.index.meta.description: Who writes VinoMartino? Meet the writers behind our wine journeys and tasting notes.
auteurs.index.lead: One notebook per trip, a distinct voice per writer. Below you will find who is behind the pieces.
auteurs.detail.emptyPre: There are no published articles by
auteurs.detail.emptyPost: yet. Keep an eye on this page; new work appears here as soon as it goes live.
